subcodes.first_line: A Book sent down in truth unto him who hath turned towards God, while every heedless and remote one hath turned away therefrom. We have entered the prison and [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب نزل بالحق لمن اقبل الی الله اذ اعرض عنه کل غافل بعید انا دخلنا السجن و
subcodes.subjects: @belief and denial, @prayer for firmness in the Covenant, @suffering and imprisonment
